w:r.w:t: I need to discuss Dr Jenny Brown here to bring credibility to my business. How I found her program and how it transformed my parenting journey
. Work with me button under “about Lil’ write up
Name of business is no longer there
at the top of the home page
I created this work from my own journey of learning how to parent with more calm, clarity, and intention.
Now, as a certified coach with a background in midwifery, I guide parents to break reactive cycles and build confident, connected relationships with their children.
Because motherhood isn’t just about having a baby—it’s about who you become, how you show up, and how your family grows along the way.
Helping you restore how you show up in life, relationships, and parenting.
I offer in-person sessions across Lake Macquarie, Newcastle, and the Hunter, with in-home visits available for motherhood support.
Online and phone coaching is also available across Australia and New Zealand.
(love your icon choices so happy for you to pick
order of service tiles and wording
ove from reactive patterns into calm, confident parenting so you can respond with clarity and connection through every stage of your child’s development.
Birth Debrief & Early Motherhood Transition Support
Process your birth experience, release guilt and overwhelm, and feel supported as you move through early motherhood and identity change.
Build self-awareness, strengthen emotional regulation, and shift how you respond under pressure so you can relate more calmly and intentionally.
Explore mindset, identity, and limiting beliefs so you can create meaningful change and live with greater clarity, confidence, and alignment.
brought onto home page under service tiles
(love it as is) but with wording
The RESTORE Method is a structured yet flexible coaching approach designed to build self-awareness, strengthen emotional intelligence, and shift how you show up in life, relationships, and parenting.
It helps you move out of reactive, autopilot patterns and into a more intentional, regulated, and aligned way of living.

While the method provides a clear pathway, the experience is tailored to you—your story, your season, and what you’re navigating right now. No two individuals or families are the same, which is why this work is never one-size-fits-all.
With a grounded and supportive approach, you are guided to create meaningful, sustainable shifts—building confidence, emotional capacity, and deeper connection in yourself and your relationships.
After this new content comes this
Become aware of your thoughts, emotions, and behavioural patterns, and how they influence the way you show up.
Understand the beliefs, experiences, and internal drivers shaping your responses and patterns.
Begin to release unhelpful patterns and choose more intentional, regulated responses.
Strengthen new ways of thinking, feeling, and behaving that support lasting change.
Take responsibility for how you show up in your life and relationships, with greater awareness and intention.
Embed new patterns through consistent practice, awareness, and repetition.
Live with greater emotional awareness, alignment, and confidence in how you show up each day.
The RESTORE Shift is the moment things begin to feel different.
It’s where self-doubt softens, reactive cycles start to break, and you begin responding with greater calm, clarity, and confidence
both internally and in your relationships.
From autopilot and overwhelm into intentional, grounded, and confident living
where you trust yourself, respond with clarity, and show up in life, relationships, and parenting with st
at the bottom of the home page
to go under the RESTORE Shift
If this resonates with where you are right now, you don’t need to keep navigating it alone.

Together, we create space to understand what’s happening beneath the surface, break reactive patterns, and support you to show up with more calm, clarity, and confidence in your life, relationships, and parenting.
Change doesn’t happen all at once
it begins in moments of awareness, support, and a willingness to do things differently.
Let’s take the next step together.
Real shifts. Real families. Real change.
From reactive patterns to confident, connected parenting
These are the kinds of shifts people experience through RESTORE Coaching:
currently testimonials are scrolling to fast.
Supporting women and families through the emotional journey of parenthood. From birth story healing to confident, emotionally aware parenting.
Helping you move from reactive patterns into calm, confident connection.
Location: Newcastle / Lake Macquarie / Online Australia & NZ
to be included in content I already have:

With over 26 years as a midwife, I've had the privilege of walking alongside women and families through some of life's most transformative moments. I've witnessed the beauty, vulnerability, and emotional complexity of becoming a parent—and how deeply those early experiences shape everything that follows.
But this work is not just professional

My journey into coaching began as I navigated raising a neurodiverse child. Like so many parents, I searched for answers, strategies, and support that would create real change. Yet despite everything I tried, nothing brought the breakthrough I was longing for.
What I came to realise changed everything: the shift I was seeking didn't begin with my
As I transformed how I saw myself, how I regulated my emotions, and how I showed up, everything around me began to shift. Not perfectly
but powerfully. That internal change reshaped both my parenting and my life, and I couldn't believe the impact it had on my family.
It was during this season that I was introduced to the work of
Jenny Brown, a psychologist with over 30 years’ experience supporting families.

, became the turning point in my parenting journey. It gave me a framework to understand behaviour, emotional regulation, and my role within the family dynamic in a way that finally created real and lasting change in our home.
As I began to trust in myself, I began to trust in my child
and this work gave me the framework to do that.

It was from this place that I felt a deep drive to bring this work to other families—because I had experienced firsthand the kind of change that is possible. I am formally trained in and deliver this program as part of my coaching practice, and today it forms the foundation of my
program, where I guide parents through these same proven principles in a supported and practical way.
It was from this place that I felt a deep drive to create something more
not just for myself, but for other families.

The impact was so significant that I knew I wanted to bring this work to other families. I am formally trained in and deliver this program as part of my coaching practice, and today it forms the foundation of my
program, where I guide parents through these same proven principles in a supported and practical way.
Alongside this, through my work in
I began to see consistent patterns across the families and individuals I was supporting. From this, I developed the RESTORE Method
my own structured coaching approach that integrates these insights into a broader framework for personal and relational transformation.

Today, as a heart-led parent coach, I bring together decades of clinical experience, emotional intelligence training, and lived wisdom. I support parents to move beyond reactivity and self-doubt, and into self-trust, emotional awareness, and grounded confidence in who they are
regardless of the child they are raising.
My work goes beyond strategies. It's about transformation.
I guide parents inward, so they can lead their families with clarity, connection, and capacity.
: Can we change the expanded Parent Coaching section layout so the
re is only 1 box, instead of two. I want a vertical
, colours and font all the same
One-to-one support to help you move from reactive patterns into calm, confident, and connected parenting.
Parent coaching with RESTORE begins here.

This structured program helps you understand the patterns driving your reactions—your triggers, emotional responses, and automatic behaviours—so you can begin responding with greater awareness and intention in everyday parenting moments.
As this awareness builds, real change begins to show up at home:
emotionally safer interactions with your child
Over time, behaviour softens, connection deepens, and parenting feels more intentional and less overwhelming.
A guided manual supports you in moving from reactive parenting into calm, confident, emotionally regulated responses—giving you practical tools for real-life moments.
Within the RESTORE Confident Parenting Journey, each step builds your awareness, strengthens emotional regulation, and supports lasting change in how you show up in parenting.
This program is guided by a structured manual developed by psychologist Dr Jenny Brown, who has over 30 years’ experience working with families since the 1980s.
This isn’t about learning more strategies. It’s about becoming the parent you already have the capacity to be.
Reconnect with your values, your vision, and the parent you want to be.
You begin to feel grounded and clear in what matters most.
Build awareness of your patterns and responses.
Parenting shifts from autopilot into conscious awareness.
Release patterns that drain your energy and create disconnection.
Begin aligning with calm, connection, and resilience.
Strengthen your ability to regulate in real time.
Move from overwhelm into clarity and steadiness.
Let go of guilt, pressure, and expectations that are not yours to carry.
Step into more confidence in how you show up.
Strengthen emotional connection through everyday interactions.
Build consistency, trust, and emotional safety.
Live the shift with greater confidence and consistency in daily parenting.
Ongoing support to embed change into real life and strengthen new patterns as challenges arise.
Structured, guided coaching using the RESTORE framework
Focus on emotional regulation, awareness, and parenting responses
Integration session to support real-life application
Next comes Monthly Ongoing Support (as a secondary section).
I want this represented as a
” making Ongoing Support a full-width section under the program, not a clickable tile or equal card
Continued support as you integrate and live the RESTORE work
After completing the Restore Confident Parenting program, many parents choose to continue with ongoing support as they apply the work in real-life parenting situations.
Parenting doesn’t follow a perfect timeline, and neither should support.

This flexible coaching option is available at any stage of your parenting journey. Whether you're navigating a specific challenge or wanting deeper, long-term growth, you'll have access to guidance, perspective, and practical support when you need it.
We continue working together for as long as you need, supporting both immediate challenges and long-term transformation.
Follow this what is currently there:
Holding space for women to process their birth story and feel safe in motherhood.
Remove all content and replace with
, and keep image in this content
Every birth story carries meaning, emotion, and impact.
This is a safe space to process your experience and gently bring understanding to what unfolded.
Together, we make sense of your story so you can move forward with clarity, self-compassion, and emotional release.
My birth story is part of me — but it does not define me as a mother. I feel grounded, clear, and more at peace with what has been.
A supportive space to process your birth experience, gain clarity, and move forward with confidence.
– vertical flow with all below content
Motherhood is not always what you expected — which is why it can feel destabilising.
You may be navigating feeding, settling, sleep deprivation, emotional waves, and identity change all at once.
Together, we regulate overwhelm in real time, build confidence in your responses, and help you begin trusting yourself as you grow into this new season.
You can choose the level of support that feels right for you.
Support designed to meet you where you are, helping you build confidence, clarity, and emotional stability over time.
Gently guided by the principles of the RESTORE Method, this work supports you toward calm, confident, and connected motherhood
“I don’t feel like myself… and I don’t know where to start.”
If you’re feeling overwhelmed or disconnected, this support helps you reset practically, mentally, and emotionally — guiding you back toward a calm, grounded foundation.
Create space and slow things down
Establish feeding, sleep, and care rhythms
“I want to stop second-guessing everything and feel more steady in myself.”
This is where things begin to shift.
You’ve started to reconnect — now we strengthen your inner stability so you can move through motherhood with more confidence and trust.
Feel more anchored in your choices
“I want to feel calm, confident, and capable in motherhood
You’re no longer just coping — you’re embodying a calmer, more confident version of yourself.
The ability to navigate challenges with clarity and calm
Choose the level of support that feels right for your current season:
Sessions are available online or in-person, depending on what feels most supportive for you.
In-person sessions are available across Lake Macquarie, Newcastle, and the Hunter region.
Emotional Intelligence (EI) is the ability to understand and work with your thoughts, emotions, and responses in everyday life.
It influences how you handle stress, make decisions, build relationships, and navigate pressure at home, work, and in relationships.
), you receive a personalised “map” of your emotional and social functioning — highlighting your strengths and areas for growth.
The insights from this assessment support you to:
Navigate stress and conflict more effectively
Develop practical skills for life, work, and parenting
Gain clarity on how you show up in daily life
is backed by over 20 years of research and is used internationally in personal development and organisational settings.
Most importantly, it gives you clear language and insight into your internal world
so change becomes understandable, not overwhelming.
Same layout as below, with same icons
This is not surface-level coaching or behavioural strategies.
understanding the patterns behind your reactions
working at the root of emotional responses
When you shift how you relate to yourself, everything else begins to shift with you.
Strengthen your emotional intelligence so you can lead, relate, and respond with greater clarity and confidence in everyday life.
This is a structured coaching process combining assessment, insight, and applied integration work.
Ready to explore your Emotional Intelligence?
If this resonates, you don’t have to navigate it alone.
and we can work through it together.
and layout all stay the same
Whether you're seeking ongoing support or a single breakthrough moment, life coaching helps you move forward with clarity, direction, and purpose.
Regular, structured support for mindset shifts, identity work, and breaking through limiting beliefs.
We work together over time to support your growth, helping you step into the version of yourself you’re becoming.
A focused, single session designed to bring clarity and perspective when you need it most.
Ideal for decision-making, specific challenges, or moments where you feel stuck and need direction.
Tailored support based on your level of need and frequency of sessions.
Includes ongoing access, structured sessions, and support to help you integrate change over time.
If you're unsure which option is right for you, a short clarity call can help guide your next step.
’ but keep the layout, fonts, colour
Explore each option with clear inclusions and support levels, so you can choose what feels right for your current season.
A supportive space to process your birth experience, gain clarity, and move forward with emotional grounding as you enter motherhood.
Choose the level of support that meets you where you are in your early motherhood journey.
ackage boxes still as you already have them but with
different titles and slight layout changes:
A foundational reset to help you feel more grounded, supported, and clear in early motherhood.
Build emotional steadiness, reduce overwhelm, and strengthen confidence in your parenting responses.
Deepen your internal calm, trust yourself more fully, and integrate lasting change into daily motherhood life.
Happy for it to be t
Personalised support tailored to you and your child’s needs
Birth Debrief session (included in all packages)
Additional sessions available at a reduced rate
Restore Confident Parenting Program (MAKE THIS YOUR PRIMARY SECTION)
A guided transformation helping you move from overwhelm into grounded, confident parenting.
For parents and individuals who want continued support and integration as life unfolds.
Ongoing coaching tailored to your needs, offering consistent guidance as you navigate parenting and personal growth.
A focused session for clarity, support, or breakthrough in a specific area.
ADD new page titled: ‘Book a Session’ page
Take the next step toward calm, confident, and connected parenting.
A short, one-to-one call to understand where you’re at and explore the best next step for you.
If you already feel clear and ready to start, you’re welcome to book a full session.
If you’re here, something has already resonated.
You don’t need to have it all figured out — just a willingness to begin.
to understand your current challenges and goals
Together, we explore what’s happening beneath the surface in your parenting
You’ll gain clarity, practical tools, and a clear sense of your next steps
From there, we can decide what level of support feels right for you
When you’re ready, you can take the next step here.
Ongoing support for parents who want continued guidance, integration, and support as they apply the RESTORE work in everyday life.
Her work deeply shaped my transformation and practice, and I’ve developed my own structured coaching method (RESTORE) that reflects those outcomes.”
The RESTORE Method is a structured coaching framework shaped by my lived experience of Dr Jenny Brown’s parenting program and my work supporting parents through real-life change.
Dr Jenny Brown, a psychologist with over 30 years’ experience working with families since the 1980s, developed the foundational parenting program that first shaped my own parenting journey.
My RESTORE Method translates these principles into a structured coaching experience for modern parents.
